text:
nvidia-driver-

– as a search phrase works well with FreshPorts, for example: 

<https://www.freshports.org/search.php?stype=name&method=prefix&query=nvidia-driver-&num=10&orderby=port&orderbyupdown=asc&search=Search&format=html&branch=head> and plain text <https://www.freshports.org/search.php?stype=name&method=prefix&query=nvidia-driver-&num=10&orderby=port&orderbyupdown=asc&search=Search&format=plaintext&branch=head>.
